category_title: Students with intellectual disabilities who develop confidence through retail customer service
scenario_title: Resistance to traditional classroom paperwork and test preparation
minimal_context: Eric is sitting in the special education classroom during pre-placement orientation, tasked with completing paperwork to prepare for a workplace safety test.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Eric, please sit down and fill out this paperwork to prepare for your workplace safety test.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I want to be a doer and work with my hands.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just do your best to answer the questions on the page.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But here we, you know, sit down and just do paperwork. I want to learn skills that you develop along the way that you won't learn in school.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to know this information for the test.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm just going to learn this for your test and then forget about it. I need hands-on learning.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Eric, please sit down and fill out this paperwork to prepare for your workplace safety test.

STUDENT: I want to be a doer and work with my hands.

TUTOR: Just do your best to answer the questions on the page.

STUDENT: But here we, you know, sit down and just do paperwork. I want to learn skills that you develop along the way that you won't learn in school.

TUTOR: You need to know this information for the test.

STUDENT: I'm just going to learn this for your test and then forget about it. I need hands-on learning.

task.content: sit down and just do paperwork and learn this for your test
task.learning_goal: prepare for the workplace, learn about safety and job readiness

context.environment: special education classes in a school for adolescents with ID and classroom pre-placement orientation
context.materials: paperwork, test, résumé, personalized placement learning plan (PPLP)
context.social_setting: classroom in a school, distinct from the work placement in the community
context.time_context: 15- to 20-hour classroom pre-placement orientation or 5th day special education classes

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When required to complete traditional school tasks like paperwork and test preparation
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Depicted school as just a place to sit down and do paperwork, stating that you learn this for your test and then forget about it
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Felt that traditional school lacked hands-on learning and skills that you develop along the way that you won't learn in school
related_quotes: learn this for your test and then forget about it
we, you know, sit down and just do paperwork

behavior_patterns.condition: When placed in a traditional classroom setting rather than a hands-on environment
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Expresses preference for hands-on learning and being a doer rather than engaging in passive paperwork
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Desires the opportunity to work with his hands and develop alternative images of himself as successful, autonomous, confident
related_quotes: learn this for your test and then forget about it
